name: BOSTON BEER CO INC
business: Boston Beer Company produces and sells alcohol beverages including flavored malt beverages, hard seltzer, beer, hard cider, spirits-based ready-to-drink beverages, and distilled spirits throughout the United States and in selected international markets. The company sells its products to a network of over 300 independent wholesalers, who in turn sell to retailers such as grocery stores, club stores, convenience stores, liquor stores, bars, restaurants, and stadiums.
sellsTo: off-premise retailers (grocery, club, convenience, liquor stores, e-commerce)

exposures.sentence: The Company produces alcohol beverages, including flavored malt beverages, hard seltzer, beer, hard cider, spirits based ready to drink beverages ( spirits RTDs ) and distilled spirits at Company-owned breweries and its cidery and under contract arrangements at other production facilities.
The Company began selling limited quantities of cannabis beverage products in Canada under the TeaPot brand during the second half of 2022.

catalysts.event: Expand Sinless Vodka Cocktails into additional states
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2026, the Company is planning to expand Sinless Vodka Cocktails into additional states, launch Twisted Tea Extreme Variety Pack, Samuel Adams Cherry Bomb Ale and Dogfish Head Grateful Dead Citrus Daydream Lager.

catalysts.event: Launch Twisted Tea Extreme Variety Pack
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2026, the Company is planning to expand Sinless Vodka Cocktails into additional states, launch Twisted Tea Extreme Variety Pack, Samuel Adams Cherry Bomb Ale and Dogfish Head Grateful Dead Citrus Daydream Lager.

catalysts.event: Launch Samuel Adams Cherry Bomb Ale
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2026, the Company is planning to expand Sinless Vodka Cocktails into additional states, launch Twisted Tea Extreme Variety Pack, Samuel Adams Cherry Bomb Ale and Dogfish Head Grateful Dead Citrus Daydream Lager.

catalysts.event: Launch Dogfish Head Grateful Dead Citrus Daydream Lager
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2026, the Company is planning to expand Sinless Vodka Cocktails into additional states, launch Twisted Tea Extreme Variety Pack, Samuel Adams Cherry Bomb Ale and Dogfish Head Grateful Dead Citrus Daydream Lager.

catalysts.event: Add new brands and styles during rest of 2026
catalysts.sentence: During the rest of 2026, the Company has plans to add new brands, new beverage styles and may reformulate existing styles of beverages.

catalysts.event: Launch additional Samuel Adams non-alcoholic styles
catalysts.sentence: The Company plans to launch additional Samuel Adams non-alcoholic styles during 2026.

catalysts.event: Capital investments between $70 million and $90 million in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Based on its current estimates of future volumes and mix, the Company expects to invest between $70 million and $90 million in 2026 to meet those estimates.

tamClaims.claim: US Beer Market in measured off-premise channels in 2025 was $47.0 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: In measured off-premise channels in 2025, the US Beer Market decreased 1.2% to $47.0 billion with Beyond beer increasing 4.4% to $10.7 billion and Traditional beer declining 2.8% to $36.3 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Beyond beer is 23% of the US Beer Market.
tamClaims.sentence: Beyond beer is 23% of the US Beer Market and the Company believes Beyond beer is positioned to continue to grow and gain share from Traditional beer.

tamClaims.claim: FMB category is $4.5 billion in measured off-premise channels, approximately 42% of Beyond beer.
tamClaims.sentence: The FMB category is $4.5 billion in measured off-premise channels and comprises approximately 42% of Beyond beer and the FMB category grew in dollars approximately 6% in 2024 and declined 4% in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Hard Seltzer category is $3.0 billion in measured off-premise channels, approximately 28% of Beyond beer.
tamClaims.sentence: The Hard Seltzer category is $3.0 billion in measured off-premise channels and comprises approximately 28% of Beyond beer and the hard seltzer category declined in dollars approximately 8% in 2024 and 4.5% in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Craft beer category is $3.4 billion in measured off-premise channels, approximately 9% of traditional beer.
tamClaims.sentence: The craft beer category is $3.4 billion in measured off-premise channels and comprises approximately 9% of traditional beer and the craft beer category in dollars declined 2% in 2024 and 3% in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Hard cider category is $0.5 billion in measured off-premise channels, approximately 4% of Beyond beer.
tamClaims.sentence: The hard cider category is $0.5 billion in measured off-premise channels and comprises approximately 4% of Beyond beer and the cider category in dollars declined 2% in 2024 and increased 4% in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Spirits RTD category is $1.7 billion in measured off-premise channels, approximately 16% of Beyond beer.
tamClaims.sentence: The spirits RTD category is $1.7 billion in measured off-premise channels and comprises approximately 16% of Beyond beer and the spirits RTD category in dollars increased approximately 24% in 2024 and 29% in 2025.
